arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer major injury blow as Ange Postecoglou faces ultimatum
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou confirms a huge injury blow for Tottenham ahead of a career-defining Europa League clash with Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham face Eintracht Frankfurt tonight with a place in the Europa League semi-final up for grabs. The second leg is finely poised following last Thursday’s 1-1 draw in north London. Heung-min Son, Wilson Odobert and Kevin Danso were all pictured in training ahead of Tottenham’s trip to Germany. arts.ttl: ‘Priority’ – Tottenham player told club determined to sign him, they want to pay half
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid have been credited with interest in Tottenham Hotspur star Cristian Romero. Recent claims have stated Diego Simeone has held talks with the centre-back and Spurs have set an €80m asking price. Thursday’s edition of AS relays that and then provides their own take. Their title says ‘priority Cuti Romero’. Within the report, it’s The post ‘Priority’ – Tottenham player told club determined to sign him, they want to pay half appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Four players could miss Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham after huge Son Heung-Min update
arts.sum: Tottenham have been dealt a major blow ahead of their Europa League quarter-final second leg against Eintracht Frankfurt, with Son Heung-Min still unavailable. Despite the significant blow, Kevin Danso is set to return to squad, after missing the last four Premier League games with a thigh issue.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham predicted as Europa League semi-final fate decided
arts.sum: Tottenham will be looking to secure their place in the Europa League semi-finals later today, with Spurs travelling to Germany to take on Eintracht Frankfurt in the quarter-finals second leg. Despite the second-half onslaught, Postecoglou's side defended well to hold out for the win and confirm their place in the Europa League semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Tottenham keen to re-sign former player, but face Chelsea competition
arts.sum: Tottenham are keen on a potential move to re-sign Kyle Walker-Peters this summer, but a number of other Premier League clubs are also considering him. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Spurs are showing the strongest interest in Walker-Peters for the moment. arts.ttl: Now or never for Postecoglou to save Spurs' season - and his job?
arts.sum: Tottenham face Eintracht Frankfurt in Europa League quarter-final second leg with questions growing around Ange Postecoglou's future. Is this a match he has to win to safeguard his future?
